race.comment: Looks a lovely race for SHULTZY (1) to return to the winner's circle. He's been good placing behind an in-form and progressive Nearco Frod at his past two since winning dominantly at Geelong. He comes back way in grade here but only rises 4kg and looks very well placed. OMAMORI (4) has been behind SHULTZY at his past two starts but wasn't far away last time on the Lakeside course. He probably gets map favours over the danger and can turn the tables with a bit of luck. Outside of that pair it's a bit of a raffle. BATOKA CHIEF (8) is going quite well and should be suited rising in trip with Williams sticking. FURTHEREST POINT (7) gets a senior rider on fourth up and is still lightly raced from a soft gate, respecting.
